summary: Add reusable segment, profile, report, audit, deliverability, cleanup, schedule conflict, universal content, image-swap, and flow preset commands.
reason: Klaviyo operators need repeatable CLI workflows for high-leverage growth operations that are not exposed by the generated endpoint mirror commands.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go test ./internal/cli/ -v -count=1; 33 dry-run smoke commands; live read-only smoke for report deliverability, profiles stats, flows audit, lists audit, and report dashboard
